entries.title: Bomberman Local Multiplayer - Game Design Plan
entries.body:
## Game: "Bomb Blast" - Local 2-Player Bomberman Clone

### Core Concept
Top-down 2D Bomberman on a grid. Two players share one keyboard. Place bombs to destroy walls and eliminate the opponent.

### Grid Layout (11x11)
- Indestructible walls in checkerboard pattern (odd rows/cols)
- Destructible walls randomly placed (60% fill)
- Starting corners cleared for each player

### Player Controls
- **Player 1**: WASD + Space (bomb)
- **Player 2**: Arrow Keys + Enter (bomb)

### Mechanics
- Grid-based movement (smooth lerp between cells)
- Bombs explode after 2.5s with cross-shaped blast (range 2)
- Destructible walls break on explosion
- Players die on explosion contact
- Power-ups: extra bomb, bigger blast range, speed boost

### Win Condition
- Last player standing wins
- Draw if both die simultaneously

### Tech: URP 2D, top-down camera, simple colored sprites via materials
